title:
Motor Vehicle Accident Claim Dataset
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## Motor Vehicle Accident Claim Dataset
I am a Master of Analytics student at Massey University. My research focuses on road safety, analyzing crash data to identify trends and develop insights on costs associated with road crashes in New Zealand. The raw data associated with the graphs and tables presented at https://www.acc.co.nz/newsroom/media-resources/road-injury-statistics would be beneficial for my Master’s dissertation. On top of this data, I was just wondering if you have data on costs incurred based on the severity of the accident, like total claims for fatal accident, serious and minor. I would highly appreciate if  I could also have a dataset associated with it.
One of my research problems is identifying the financial and social impact of accidents of varying severity and road type.
The dataset will be used for academic research to evaluate financial trends, demographic influences, and regional disparities related to road crashes. I'm looking at contributing to the road safety policy recommendations using my analysis.

### Response from Accident Compensation Corporation
Status Dataset submitted
Comments Kia ora 

Your Official Information Act request, reference: GOV-038239
Please follow this link for the information requested: https://catalogue.data.govt.nz/dataset/gov-038239-motor-vehicle-accident-claims-data

Attached is the data set for the information referred to on ACC’s newsroom website
The notes tab provides information to interpret the data. 

Attached is motor vehicle data providing the closest information we hold about injury severity
We have provided data for claims according to the type of indicators on the claim or the types of payments on the claim. The notes tab provides further information about the data.

As this information may be of interest to other members of the public 
ACC may publish a copy of this response on ACC’s website. All requester data, including your name and contact details, will be removed prior to release. The released response will be made available www.acc.co.nz/resources/#/category/12. Please also view this page about making requests and our published responses https://www.acc.co.nz/contact/official-information-act-requests.

If you have any questions about this response, please get in touch
You can email me at GovernmentServices@acc.co.nz. 


Ngā mihi
 
Christopher Johnston
Manager Official Information Act Services
Government Engagement

#### Likely Source Agency
Accident Compensation Corporation
